title: Assignment of appellate panels
doc_html:
Art. 2164.1. Assignment of appellate panels

            The provisions of R.S. 13:319 shall be applicable to assignment of appellate panels.

            Acts 2018, No. 658, §2.
doc_text:
Art. 2164.1.  Assignment of appellate panels
